description: Critical poly_bot rebalance planner, executor, blocked, or stuck health signals from the production runtime.
filter: (resource.type="gce_instance" OR (resource.type="k8s_container" AND resource.labels.cluster_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.namespace_name="arb-bot" AND resource.labels.container_name="arb-bot")) AND ((jsonPayload.message =~ "rebalance executor failed closed" OR textPayload =~ "rebalance executor failed closed") OR (jsonPayload.message =~ "rebalance planning failed closed" OR textPayload =~ "rebalance planning failed closed") OR ((jsonPayload.message =~ "rebalance health heartbeat" AND jsonPayload.message =~ "healthy.:false") OR (textPayload =~ "rebalance health heartbeat" AND textPayload =~ "healthy.:false")))
